description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Coverity Scan that runs on every push to the main branch, once a week on Wednesdays, and manually through a workflow dispatch. In an ubuntu-latest job, check out the repository, update apt, install required packages, run autogen.sh and configure with dynamic libraries, then use the Coverity Scan action to perform a make command with multiple processors and authenticate with Coverity Scan credentials from secrets.
